leadText: Tofu (Japanese: トーフ Tofu) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V An ingredient with a touch of sweetness. It's unclear how well this raw block of tofu will serve as a sandwich filling.
